name: ISNetworld Contractor Safety API
what_it_does: ISNetworld REST API for contractor and supplier safety prequalification and management platform. Enables AI agents to manage contractor safety grade (ISN Grade) and qualification status retrieval for supply chain risk decisions, handle contractor safety statistics including TRIR, DART, and EMR data for safety performance evaluation, access contractor insurance certificate verification and compliance status, retrieve training and certification completion status for qualified contractor access, manage contractor regulatory compliance and license verification data, handle incident reporting and safety program audit results, access contractor financial and capacity data for procurement decisions, retrieve contractor diversity and sustainability data for supply chain ESG programs, manage work permit and job hazard analysis (JHA) data for site operations, and integrate contractor qualification data with procurement and HSE management systems.
use_cases: Checking contractor safety grades from procurement automation agents
Verifying insurance compliance from contractor onboarding agents
Monitoring TRIR/EMR data from supply chain safety agents
Screening contractor qualifications from vendor management agents
not_for: Internal employee safety without third-party contractor management
Consumer services without enterprise industrial contractor risk management
Simple vendor lists without safety prequalification and performance tracking
best_when: An oil & gas, chemical, or construction company using ISNetworld wants AI agents to automate contractor safety screening, qualification verification, insurance monitoring, and HSE compliance reporting.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: Contractor safety qualification data drives site access decisions for high-hazard industrial environments — automated access decisions without safety professional review creates liability in OSHA-regulated and contractor injury risk contexts. ISN Grade automation that approves borderline contractors for critical work without manual review can create safety incidents. Insurance gap automation without coverage limit validation creates uninsured contractor liability.

auth.notes: ISNetworld uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-client credentials. API documentation at isnetworld.com. Webhooks for qualification status changes. REST API with JSON. Houston, Texas HQ. Private. Dominant in oil & gas contractor management. 80,000+ contractor companies. Competes with Avetta for contractor management platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription for hiring clients; contractor fees separate
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per client company; contractor annual subscription fee
pricing.notes: Houston, Texas. Founded 2001. Private. Contractor safety management market. 80,000+ contractor companies in network. Dominant in oil & gas and chemicals. ISN Grade is industry standard contractor safety rating in energy sector. Competes with Avetta and Veriforce for contractor prequalification market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API portal

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: ISN Grade automation for high-hazard site access requires safety professional review; borderline grades for critical work must be escalated for human decision
ISN Grade interpretation — ISN Grade is a composite score; automated pass/fail on grade alone may miss critical safety deficiencies requiring manual review
Oil & gas industry standard — ISN Grade is particularly dominant in energy sector; understand industry-specific grade thresholds for oil & gas contractors
Contractor annual renewal — ISN qualification requires annual renewal; automated systems must track expiration and proactively flag upcoming renewal needs
TRIR/EMR data lag — safety statistics (TRIR, DART, EMR) are based on OSHA 300 log data reported annually; data lags reflect prior year performance not current
Insurance certificate naming — automated insurance verification must check that your company is named insured or additional insured; generic policy verification misses naming requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Contractor safety management. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/CA. Contractor safety and qualification data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Contractor management. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Contractor safety and insurance data.
